p.seg: Uhtred son of Fergus and his spouse, Gunnild daughter of Waldef, send greeting to all sons of Holy Mother Church.

Let those to come and those present know that we, with the consent of Lachlan our heir, have given and by this our charter made firm the church of Torpenhow with land and all revenues rightfully belonging to it to the church of Holyrood at Maidens’ Castle [i.e. Edinburgh] and to the canons serving God there, in perpetual alms, for the redemption of the soul of Waldef and Fergus and of all our ancestors. Wherefore we firmly will that the same canons should have and possess the aforenamed church as freely and quitely as any church in the whole bishopric of Carlisle is freely held and possessed.

With these witnesses: Geoffrey abbot of Dunfermline, Osbert abbot of Jedburgh, Alured abbot of Stirling; Gilla Muire mac Blancard, Gilla Muire Albanach, Gilla Brigte mac Gillefin, Serlo, Bernard, Richard Berth, burgesses.
